G: refactor(loadUser)
C: async_await(loadUser)∧minimal_async_await(loadUser)
P: missing_id_before_db(loadUser)→promisify(db.findUser)
V: same_order(missing_id,db.findUser,not_found,audit.log,cache.set)∧one_next(err)∧db_err->next(err)∧not_found_before_audit(loadUser)
R

G: refactor(createInvoice)

V: missing_input_before_db(createInvoice)∧not_found_before_audit(createInvoice)

G: refactor(verifyWebhook)
C: async_await∧minimal_change
P: same_order(raw_body,verifySignature,parse_json,db.insertEvent,next)→next(err)
V: async∧await∧one_next(err)
R: !reorder∧!extra_logic
A: verifyWebhook async_await same_order(raw_body,verifySignature,parse_json,db.insertEvent,next) db

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor(sendEmailReceipt)
C: async_await∧minimal_change
P: load_user→render_template→smtp ∧ send→audit ∧ log→next∧db_err->next(err)
V: same_order∧one_next(err)∧minimal_async_await
R: !missing_id_before_db∧!not_found_before_audit
A: async(sendEmailReceipt)∧await(load_user)

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor(sendEmailReceipt).
Constraints: async/await and minimal_change.
Plan: load_user then render_template then smtp and send then audit and log then next and db_err then next(err).
Verify: same validation order and one_next(err) and minimal async/await migration.
Risk: high-risk missing id check before database call and high-risk not found check before audit.
Answer target: async(sendEmailReceipt) and await(load_user).

V: async(reconcileBatch)∧await(db.fetchRows)∧await(db.save)∧next(err)
R:
async syncSearchIndex(req, res, next) { same_order(load_doc,transform,index.upsert,audit.log,done) ∧ minimal_async_await ∧ async_await ∧ db_err->next(err) }

V: missing_id_before_db ∧ not_found_before_audit

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor(bustProfileCache).
Constraints: async/await and minimal async/await migration and same validation order(load_user, cache.del, cache.prime, audit.log, next) and one_next(err).
Plan: db_err then next(err) and await(cache.set).
Verify: missing id check before database call and not found check before audit.

Answer target: promisify.
